tasks.prompt:
Review the pre-implementation report at PRE_IMPLEMENTATION_REPORT.md against the current project state:

1. Run `git status` to check what's been committed vs still pending
2. Re-read PRE_IMPLEMENTATION_REPORT.md §7 (checklist) and §2 (untracked files)
3. Run `python -m pytest tests/ 06-ai-analyzer/tests/ -q` to confirm test count
4. Check if hardware has been ordered/received (Phase 1.5 prerequisite)
5. Report:
   - Which P0 items are now DONE
   - Which items still BLOCKED
   - Any NEW issues found since last review
   - Update the review log at §10 of the report
6. If all P0 items are done, suggest moving to P1 items
